items.title: Alpha-Synuclein Seed Amplification Assay in CSF, Skin, and Submandibular Gland From Incidental Lewy Body Disease and Parkinson Disease.
items.abstract: Using RT-QuIC seeding assays determine the presence of pathogenic alpha-synuclein (aSyn) aggregates in the submandibular gland (SMG), skin, and CSF from autopsy-confirmed cases of incidental Lewy body disease (ILBD), Parkinson disease (PD), and controls. Submandibular gland, skin, and CSF samples from autopsied cases in the Arizona Study of Aging and Neurodegenerative Disorders (AZSAND) were assayed using RT-QuIC methods. Correlations with the Unified Staging System for Lewy Body Disorders (USSLB) was performed. A total of 19 controls, 40 ILBD, and 15 PD cases were studied. While aSyn seeding assays were positive in all 3 tissues from ILBD cases, the sensitivity was much lower in the SMG (13/37, 35.1%) and skin (6/16, 37.5%) than in CSF (25/33, 75.8%). In PD sensitivity was good in all tissues: SMG (7/8, 87.5%), skin (7/8, 87.5%), and CSF (10/10, 100%), as was specificity in CSF (9/12, 75%), skin (8/9, 88.9%), and SMG (7/9, 77.8%). USSLB stage correlated with aSyn SAA positivity in all 3 tissues with CSF most sensitive to stages I and II (IIa and IIb) cases. In the 20 cases that had all 3 tissues tested only 2 were positive in the SMG but not CSF and one in skin but not CSF. There were 6 ILBD cases that had positive CSF but not SMG or skin, and one of these ILBD cases was USSLB stage I (olfactory bulb only). In this small study of autopsy-confirmed ILBD, aSyn seeding assays had moderately high sensitivity (75.8%) in the CSF but not in skin or SMG. In PD, the skin, SMG, and CSF showed high sensitivity, with specificity being similar in all tissues, although sample sizes were small. These results, although preliminary, suggest that detecting aSyn using seeding assays of CSF, but not the skin or SMG, may be valuable for identifying individuals with prodromal Lewy body disease. This is especially true for ILBD cases that often had Lewy bodies in the olfactory bulb only (USSLB Stage I) or in brainstem regions (Stage IIa), suggesting that detecting these cases may require CSF and not biopsies of the skin or SMG.
items.summary_ja:
背景：レビー小体病（Lewy body disease, LBD）やパーキンソン病（PD）の病理的α-シヌクレイン（aSyn）凝集体の検出は診断に重要であるが、どの組織での検出が有用かは明確でない。  
方法：解剖確認された偶発性レビー小体病（ILBD）、PD、および対照群の唾液腺（SMG）、皮膚、脳脊髄液（CSF）を用い、RT-QuICシード増幅アッセイでaSyn凝集体の有無を調べた。USSLB（レビー小体病の統一病期分類）との相関も解析した。  
結果：ILBDではCSFの感度が75.8%と高かったが、SMG（35.1%）や皮膚（37.5%）は低感度であった。PDでは3組織とも感度が高く、CSFは100%、SMGと皮膚は87.5%であった。特異度はCSF、皮膚、SMGで70～90%程度であった。USSLB病期とaSyn陽性率は全組織で相関し、CSFは特に初期病期（ステージI・II）で感度が高かった。  
結論：ILBDの早期病変検出にはCSFのaSynシード増幅アッセイが有用であり、皮膚やSMGの生検よりもCSF検査が優れている可能性が示唆された。PDでは全組織で高感度・高特異度を示し、CSF検査は前駆期LBDの診断に有望である。
items.summary_short_ja: 本研究は、RT-QuIC法を用いて偶発性レビー小体病（ILBD）およびパーキンソン病（PD）の剖検確認例から採取した唾液腺、皮膚、脳脊髄液（CSF）中の病原性α-シヌクレイン凝集体を検出した。ILBDではCSFの感度が75.8%と高い一方、皮膚や唾液腺は低感度であった。PDでは全組織で感度・特異度が高く、CSF検査が早期段階のILBD検出に有用と示唆された。

items.title: Early Cerebral Edema Subtypes and Functional Outcome in Patients With Cerebral Venous Thrombosis: Insights From the CLOT-VENUS Registry.
items.abstract: Cerebral edema is a common yet poorly defined neuroimaging feature in cerebral venous thrombosis (CVT), and its influence on downstream clinical outcomes has not been fully elucidated. We aimed to characterize cerebral edema subtypes and evaluate their effect on functional outcomes in patients with CVT. We conducted a retrospective analysis using the CLOT-VENUS (Collaboration on Cerebral Venous Thrombosis) registry, an international cohort of patients with acute CVT treated at 2 major stroke centers in the United States and Mexico between 2004 and 2024. Admission neuroimaging (MRI and/or CT) was independently reviewed to classify cerebral edema into 3 subtypes: global cerebral edema, cytotoxic edema, and vasogenic edema. The primary outcome was the 6-month modified Rankin Scale (mRS) score, which was assessed as an ordinal shift. Secondary outcomes included ordinal mRS score at discharge, poor functional outcome (mRS 3-6 vs 0-2 and mRS 2-6 vs 0-1), in-hospital mortality, 6-month mortality, and length of hospital stay (LOS). Multivariable models adjusted for prespecified baseline confounders were used to estimate the effect of cerebral edema on these outcomes. We included 394 patients with CVT (mean age was 42.7 ± 16.9 years; 65.5% female). Cerebral edema was identified in 220 patients and classified as cytotoxic edema (32.5%), global cerebral edema (25.6%), or vasogenic edema (24.9%). At discharge, global cerebral edema (adjusted odds ratio [aOR]: 2.79; 95% CI 1.83-4.27;  Our results suggest that cytotoxic and global cerebral edema independently worsened 6-month functional outcomes in patients with CVT, with cytotoxic edema also increasing the risk of in-hospital mortality. Prospective studies should evaluate whether early cerebral edema subtypes can serve as critical entities that could potentially stratify patients for adjunctive therapies beyond anticoagulation.
items.summary_ja:
背景：脳静脈血栓症（CVT）における脳浮腫は一般的だが、その種類や臨床転帰への影響は十分に解明されていない。  
方法：2004年から2024年に米国とメキシコの2つの主要脳卒中センターで治療を受けた急性CVT患者394例を対象に、CLOT-VENUSレジストリのデータを用いて後ろ向き解析を実施。入院時のMRIおよびCT画像を独立して評価し、脳浮腫を全脳浮腫、細胞障害性浮腫、血管原性浮腫の3つに分類。主要評価項目は6か月後の修正Rankinスケール（mRS）スコアの変化とした。  
結果：220例に脳浮腫を認め、細胞障害性浮腫が32.5％、全脳浮腫が25.6％、血管原性浮腫が24.9％であった。多変量解析により、細胞障害性および全脳浮腫は6か月の機能的転帰を有意に悪化させ、細胞障害性浮腫は院内死亡リスクも増加させた。  
結論：細胞障害性および全脳浮腫はCVT患者の予後不良と関連し、特に細胞障害性浮腫は死亡率を高める。今後は早期の脳浮腫サブタイプが抗凝固療法以外の補助療法の適応決定に役立つか検討が必要である。
items.summary_short_ja: 脳静脈血栓症（CVT）患者394例を対象に、早期脳浮腫を細胞障害性、全脳性、血管原性の3型に分類し、機能的予後への影響を検討した。細胞障害性および全脳性浮腫は6か月後の機能障害を独立して悪化させ、特に細胞障害性浮腫は院内死亡率も上昇させた。これらの浮腫サブタイプは、抗凝固療法に加えた治療戦略の層別化に有用な指標となる可能性が示唆された。

items.title: A Probabilistic Approach to Functional Organization Based on Extraoperative Electrocortical Stimulation Mapping.
items.abstract: Direct electrocortical stimulation (DES) is the gold standard for mapping eloquent cortex, yet existing functional atlases are limited by sampling biases and density-based methods that obscure a region's true functional probability. Consequently, interpatient variability and the functional contributions of nontraditional language areas, such as the middle frontal gyrus, remain poorly characterized, particularly in epilepsy populations where functional reorganization is common. We therefore developed a probabilistic functional atlas of extraoperative DES and applied data-driven methods to characterize the functional organization of language, motor, and sensory cortex. This was a retrospective observational study of patients undergoing intracranial monitoring for drug-resistant epilepsy (2008-2023). Electrical stimulation was delivered to intracranial electrodes during language tasks, and language, motor, and sensory findings were recorded. Positive and negative stimulation sites were analyzed in standard patient space and using the Human Connectome Project parcellation atlas. A multilevel statistical framework, including probability mapping, bootstrapped region-of-interest analyses, and kernel density estimation, defined structure-function relationships. Generalized linear mixed-effects models assessed the influence of clinical variables on language disruption. We analyzed 2,124 trials from 125 patients (mean age 30 years; 47% female). Instead of eloquent functions clustering into discrete canonical regions, they were distributed throughout the cortex along probabilistic continua. Language disruption demonstrated high interpatient variability with the middle frontal gyrus emerging as a high probability area for naming and speech arrest. Motor responses were not confined to the precentral gyrus but frequently extended into parietal association cortex. Clinically, early seizure onset ( This extraoperative DES atlas provides a comprehensive benchmark for understanding functional cortical organization in epilepsy. We add evidence to the growing literature that language and motor systems are more distributed and variable than classically described. Substantial interpatient variability underscores the necessity of individualized mapping to guide safe neurosurgical planning. Limitations include the retrospective design and sampling bias inherent to electrode placement.
items.summary_ja:
背景：直接皮質電気刺激（DES）は機能的皮質マッピングのゴールドスタンダードであるが、既存の機能アトラスはサンプリングバイアスや密度ベースの手法により真の機能的確率を反映できず、特にてんかん患者における非伝統的言語領域の機能的役割や個体差が十分に解明されていない。  
方法：2008年から2023年に薬剤抵抗性てんかん患者125名（平均年齢30歳）を対象に、頭蓋内電極を用いた言語課題中のDESデータ2,124試行を後ろ向きに解析。標準空間およびHuman Connectome Projectパーセルレーションを用い、多層統計モデル、確率マッピング、ブートストラップ解析、カーネル密度推定で構造と機能の関係を評価。  
結果：言語・運動・感覚機能は従来の離散的領域に限定されず、皮質全体に確率的に分布。言語障害は患者間で大きく異なり、中前頭回が命名や発話停止の高確率領域として浮上。運動反応は中心前回に限らず頭頂連合野にも広がった。  
結論：本研究はてんかんにおける機能的皮質組織の包括的確率的アトラスを提供し、言語・運動系の分布性と個体差の大きさを示す。これにより安全な神経外科手術計画には個別マッピングの重要性が強調される。設計の後ろ向き性と電極配置によるサンプリングバイアスが限界である。
items.summary_short_ja: 本研究は、薬剤抵抗性てんかん患者125名の術前脳内電気刺激（DES）データを用い、言語・運動・感覚皮質の機能的組織を確率的手法で解析した。結果、言語機能は中前頭回を含む広範囲に分布し、運動機能も中心前回に限定されず頭頂連合野まで及ぶことが示された。患者間で機能分布に大きな個人差があり、個別の機能マッピングの重要性が強調された。

items.title: Dual Antiplatelet Therapy and Immediate Intensive Statin in Mild Ischemic Stroke: A Randomized Trial.
items.abstract: Previous studies have shown a beneficial effect of clopidogrel-aspirin and intensive statin therapy in acute ischemic stroke; however, the synergistic effect of the 2 treatments is still unclear. The aim of this study was to investigate the effect of combining clopidogrel-aspirin and immediate intensive statin in patients with acute mild ischemic stroke or transient ischemic attack (TIA). We performed a multicenter, randomized, double-blind, placebo-controlled trial with a 2-by-2 factorial design across 222 hospitals in China. Eligible participants were patients with acute mild ischemic stroke or TIA of a presumed atherosclerotic cause within 72 hours of symptom onset. Patients were randomly assigned to receive clopidogrel plus aspirin or aspirin alone and an immediate or delayed intensive statin. The primary efficacy outcome was a new stroke (ischemic or hemorrhagic) within 90 days, and the primary safety outcome was moderate-to-severe bleeding. Between September 17, 2018, and October 15, 2022, 6,100 patients were enrolled (median age, 65 years; 64.2% male), of whom 1,525 each were assigned to the 4 groups. New stroke within 90 days occurred in 116 patients (7.6%) in the clopidogrel-aspirin plus immediate intensive statin group (hazard ratio [HR] 0.76, 95% CI 0.60-0.97), in 106 patients (7.0%) in the clopidogrel-aspirin plus delayed statin group (HR 0.69, 95% Cl 0.54-0.89), and in 129 patients (8.5%) in the aspirin plus immediate statin group (HR 0.85, 95% Cl 0.67 to 1.07), compared with 150 patients (9.9%) in the aspirin plus delayed intensive statin group. Moderate-to-severe bleeding occurred in 17 (1.1%) in the clopidogrel-aspirin plus immediate statin group ( Among patients with mild ischemic stroke or TIA of presumed atherosclerotic cause, the combination of clopidogrel-aspirin and delayed intensive statin was superior to aspirin plus delayed intensive statin in reducing the risk of new stroke, an effect that was mainly driven by clopidogrel-aspirin and not significantly different from that of clopidogrel-aspirin plus immediate statin. The combination treatment had a low but increased risk of moderate-to-severe bleeding. ClinicalTrials.gov identifier: NCT03635749. This study provides Class I evidence that in patients with mild ischemic stroke or TIA of presumed atherosclerotic cause, the combination of clopidogrel-aspirin plus delayed intensive statin was superior to aspirin plus delayed intensive statin in reducing the 90-day risk of new stroke.
items.summary_ja:
背景：軽度虚血性脳卒中または一過性脳虚血発作（TIA）患者におけるクロピドグレル・アスピリン併用療法と集中的スタチン治療の相乗効果は不明であった。  
方法：中国の222病院で多施設ランダム化二重盲検プラセボ対照試験を実施。発症72時間以内の軽度虚血性脳卒中またはTIA患者6,100名を対象に、クロピドグレル・アスピリン併用またはアスピリン単独、即時または遅延の集中的スタチン投与の4群に分けた。主要評価項目は90日以内の新規脳卒中発症、主要安全性評価は中等度以上の出血。  
結果：クロピドグレル・アスピリン＋遅延スタチン群はアスピリン＋遅延スタチン群に比べ、新規脳卒中リスクが有意に低下（7.0% vs 9.9%、ハザード比0.69）。即時スタチン併用群との有意差はなかった。中等度以上の出血リスクは併用療法でわずかに増加した。  
結論：軽度虚血性脳卒中またはTIA患者において、クロピドグレル・アスピリン併用と遅延集中的スタチン治療の組み合わせは、アスピリン単独よりも90日以内の新規脳卒中リスクを有意に減少させることが示された。
items.summary_short_ja: 本研究は、軽度虚血性脳卒中または一過性脳虚血発作（TIA）患者におけるクロピドグレル・アスピリン併用療法と即時または遅延の集中的スタチン療法の効果を検証した。結果、クロピドグレル・アスピリン併用と遅延スタチン群がアスピリン単独と遅延スタチン群に比べ、新規脳卒中リスクを有意に低減した。併用療法は中等度以上の出血リスクをわずかに増加させたが、安全性は許容範囲内であった。

items.title: The Influence of Recording Duration and Vigilance State on High-Frequency Oscillation Characterization in Epilepsy.
items.abstract: High-frequency oscillations (HFOs) are a promising biomarker for localizing epileptogenic tissue, yet the extent to which recording duration and vigilance state influence their spatial distributions remains unclear. This study quantified the recording duration and vigilance state required to reliably capture HFO spatial distributions to guide surgical planning in epilepsy. We retrospectively analyzed long-term, continuous iEEG recordings from patients with drug-resistant epilepsy undergoing presurgical evaluation at the University of Michigan. Sleep stages were manually annotated, HFOs (80-500 Hz) were detected using a validated algorithm, and the correlations between HFOs and the seizure-onset zone (SOZ) were assessed across vigilance states. A novel similarity-based temporal padding approach was developed to measure the similarity of HFO distributions derived from data available up to a given time point with those derived from the full recording. Postsurgical outcome prediction was evaluated using a decision tree classifier based on the proportion of resected, top-ranked HFO-rate channels (critical resection percentage, CReP). Fifty-four patients were analyzed (30 female patients, mean age 32.8 [range, 6-66] years, mean recording duration 8.40 days [range, 3-22]). HFO-SOZ associations were present across all states but fluctuated over time; non-rapid eye movement (NREM) sleep showed the least temporal variability. HFO-SOZ associations were stronger in temporal lobe epilepsy and more stable in patients with frequent seizures. When analyzing only the HFOs during NREM, 21% of patients required more than 2 days of recording to capture its full distribution; however, all NREM data were insufficient to describe the full HFO distribution in 30% of patients. Across all vigilance states, 7 days of recording fully characterized HFO distributions in 98% of patients. Postsurgical outcome prediction using multiday aggregate CReP achieved more robust and accurate performance (AUC 0.86, 95% CI [0.70-1.00]) than analyses based on a random selection of single 5-minute NREM epoch (median AUC 0.42, IQR 0.23) or a single day (AUCs ranged 0.63-0.71 for different analyzed days). Short sampling period risks incomplete representation of the full HFO spatial profile. Future studies should consider multiday recordings to enable more reliable HFO characterization and improve HFO-based surgical outcome prediction.
items.summary_ja:
背景：高周波振動（HFO）はてんかんの発作焦点局在化に有望なバイオマーカーであるが、記録時間や覚醒状態がHFOの空間分布に与える影響は不明である。  
方法：薬物抵抗性てんかん患者54名の長期連続脳内脳波（iEEG）記録（平均8.4日）を用い、睡眠段階を手動で注釈し、80-500HzのHFOを検出。HFOと発作開始領域（SOZ）の関連を覚醒状態別に評価し、類似性に基づく新たな時間的パディング手法で部分データと全記録のHFO分布の類似度を測定。術後予後予測には決定木分類器を用いた。  
結果：HFO-SOZ関連は全覚醒状態で認められたが、非レム睡眠（NREM）で最も安定。NREMのみの解析では21%の患者で2日以上の記録が必要であり、30%ではNREMデータだけで全HFO分布を把握できなかった。全覚醒状態を含めると7日間の記録で98%の患者のHFO分布を完全に特徴付けられた。多日間のデータを用いた予後予測（AUC 0.86）は、単一5分NREMや単日解析よりも優れた精度を示した。  
結論：短期間の記録ではHFOの空間的特徴を十分に捉えられないため、多日間の連続記録がHFOの信頼性ある特徴付けと術後予後予測の向上に重要である。
items.summary_short_ja: 本研究は、てんかんの手術計画における高周波振動（HFO）の空間分布を正確に把握するために必要な記録期間と覚醒状態を検討した。54例の長期iEEGデータを解析し、非レム睡眠（NREM）中のHFO分布が最も安定する一方で、全患者の30％ではNREMのみで完全な分布把握が困難であった。全覚醒状態を含む7日間の記録で98％の患者のHFO分布を網羅でき、複数日のデータを用いた術後予測は単一短時間記録よりも高精度であった。
